parameters.name: mono
parameters.label: Monochrome
parameters.description: Adjust the amount of color left in the image. 0 is full color, 1 is full greyscale.

parameters.name: rgb
parameters.label: RGB
parameters.description: This menu selects how the monochrome conversion is calculated for the RGB channels.

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.label: Alpha
parameters.description: This menu selects how the monochrome conversion is calculated for the alpha channel.
